reviewer: agent build+matrix pass (headless Chrome real download+run on WASM, Node cross-check, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — revision 1

rubric.evidence: REAL in-browser run (headless Chrome, WASM, fresh profile → Download → auto-run): the model reranked the mixed EN/ZH/ES default set and reordered it — top-3 = [#1 (was #6) 'Succulents and cacti tolerate weeks of neglect… ideal if you travel often.' logit -3.58; #2 (was #5) Spanish 'Agrupa las macetas lejos del sol directo…' logit -5.04; #3 'A neighbour popping in to water once a week…' logit -7.05]. 0 console errors. Node cross-check (onnx-community/bge-reranker-v2-m3-ONNX, q8): logits tensor [3,1], a Chinese/Spanish relevant passage outranks an irrelevant English one. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/bge-reranker-v2/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/bge-reranker-v2/mobile.png
rubric.notes: Agent-verified real WASM run in the browser; relevant passage ranked #1.

rubric.evidence: Cross-encoder output shape is one relevance logit per (query,passage) pair (num_labels=1 → logits [N,1]); higher = more relevant. Semantics correct AND cross-lingual: a Spanish passage (relevance) ranked #2, above an English but irrelevant 'watering the lawn' line — the M3 backbone matches meaning across languages, not words. Verified in browser + Node.

At-a-glance declares the exact model id (onnx-community/bge-reranker-v2-m3-ONNX, linked), task (text-classification used as a cross-encoder reranker), backend (WebAssembly), and quantisation (q8). Inference runs in a module Web Worker (models/bge-reranker-v2/worker.js). Conformance derives declares-model-id/task/backend/quantisation + inference-off-main-thread.

Loads through the shared createModelLoader auto-init architecture (no hand-rolled Load button). Headless fresh profile showed 'Download model (~571 MB)'; after the click it auto-loaded to state=ready and ran, exposing a 'Clear cached model' control. A returning visit auto-inits from the transformers.js cache with no Load click. Verified download→ready→run in headless.

A role=status aria-live #runStatus region reports 'Scoring query–passage pairs…' / 'Done.' / errors; the shared loader streams download progress and offers Retry on failure; the WASM path needs no GPU so it works offline once cached. Failures surface on the page (Reranking failed: …), not only the console.
rubric.notes: Runs on WASM — no WebGPU required; degrades honestly.

rubric.evidence: Query input (Enter reranks), passages textarea, and the Rerank button are real, labelled, keyboard-operable; the use-case pages add scenario chips and a top-k number input. All exercised. The results list, before/after view, and cross-encoder-vs-lexical contrast all render from the real run.

The ranking, logits, sigmoid probabilities and before/after view are all produced by the on-device cross-encoder run (verified real output above). The lexical-overlap column is clearly labelled as a naive contrast baseline, never presented as the model's ranking. No canned result.

Buttons expose accessible names; the query input and passages textarea have associated labels; state announced via role=status aria-live. No images without alt (text/table only). Conformance images-have-alt + buttons-have-names derive as auto-checks.

responsive-check.mjs: desktop (1280×800) + mobile (360×740 DPR3) both automated-clean (no horizontal overflow). Screenshots reviewed: at-a-glance table, ranked-result rows, and the before/after + contrast grids (repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr))) collapse cleanly on mobile with CJK/accented text legible. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/bge-reranker-v2/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/bge-reranker-v2/mobile.png

All cross-encoder inference runs in a module Web Worker; the page only renders the returned ranking, so the interaction path stays off the main thread and INP stays low. Batched single forward pass over all pairs.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep heavy JS off the interaction path so INP stays low.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the cross-encoder batch forward pass runs in a Web Worker; the main thread only renders the ranked list + before/after view.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: models/bge-reranker-v2/worker.js runs the pipeline; rerank.js renders results; browser run had 0 console errors and stayed responsive

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Offload / break up long main-thread tasks.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — inference is entirely off the main thread in a module worker.

guidanceConsulted.query: results list before/after reorder without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid grid that wraps; avoid fixed widths; let long passages wrap.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — .ba-wrap/.ct-wrap use grid repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr)); result rows wrap long CJK/accented passages.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-check desktop+mobile automated-clean; mobile screenshot reviewed, no overflow

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Accessible form controls with clear, associated labels.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the query <input> and passages <textarea> have associated <label>s; scenario chips and Rerank are real buttons; Enter reranks.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: run panel markup; conformance buttons-have-names derives as pass

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label controls; announce state in a live region.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live #runStatus, labelled controls, keyboard-operable buttons.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page nav.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in the shared public/styles.css.

followUpGoals.goal: Add a bge-reranker-v2-m3 multi-model demo pairing it with the newer bge-m3 dense+sparse hybrid retriever for a full FlagEmbedding two-stage pipeline.

summary: Revision-1 build+matrix pass for bge-reranker-v2 (BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3, the second-generation multilingual cross-encoder on the M3/XLM-RoBERTa-large backbone). Real in-browser WASM rerank verified in headless Chrome: a relevant passage ranked #1 and a Spanish relevant passage outranked an irrelevant English one (cross-lingual), 0 console errors; Node cross-checked the [N,1] logit shape. Desktop+mobile automated-clean with screenshots reviewed; shared auto-init loader, off-main-thread worker, and full a11y semantics. Distinct from the v1 bge-reranker-base (larger backbone, broader language reach).
